news.paragraph: IWM is experiencing downward pressure as US equities and exchange-traded funds decline following the release of hot inflation data. The primary catalyst for recent market movement is the consumer inflation report, which has contributed to falling equity futures. Options traders should account for this heightened volatility driven by macroeconomic data.
